title: Create-Technical(CreateTech)
description: Forge Modpack for Advanced Create Mod Experience
body:
![partner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ced4f8898b6ba459f0ba60247deb04ffc01fd1db_0.webp)
#
![logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/691/785/untitled-design-11.png)


Welcome to CreateTech, a cutting-edge Minecraft modpack designed to elevate your Create mod experience to new heights! Dive into a world of limitless possibilities and technological marvels as you harness the power of the renowned Create mod and its carefully selected add-ons.

 CreateTech is exclusively crafted for Minecraft version 1.19.2, utilizing Forge to deliver a seamless and immersive gameplay experience. Immerse yourself in an environment where ingenuity meets ingenuity, where the boundaries of engineering are pushed to their limits.

With CreateTech, you'll embark on a thrilling journey through a realm of advanced mechanics and automation. Tackle intricate puzzles and construct elaborate contraptions using the expansive features of the Create mod and its addons. Utilize complex machinery, ingenious gadgets, and powerful tools to automate tasks, streamline processes, and create awe-inspiring inventions.

If you have any queries/issues found leave a comment or contact me on discord:@kozmocraft or email: kozmocraft.official@gmail.com

Also avalable in [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-technical-createtech)
#

#
 ### To users who downloaded the modpack

# THANK YOU!!

 

**Please note that CreateTech is a passion project, lovingly created by a dedicated Minecraft enthusiast. This modpack represents the first season of the series, and its future iterations depend on the demand from the community. Join us on this exciting adventure and let your imagination soar as you reshape the world with the power of CreateTech!**
